'''√?-p-f''' ('''apafath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fall|fall]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fall|fall]]
|-
! Citation form
| √?-p-f
|-
! Lemma
| apafath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thi?apaf|thi?apaf]] || [[word:ji?apaf|ji?apaf]] || [[word:shi?apaf|shi?apaf]] || [[word:ki?apaf|ki?apaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthu?apaf|thuthu?apaf]] || [[word:juju?apaf|juju?apaf]] || [[word:shushu?apaf|shushu?apaf]] || [[word:kuku?apaf|kuku?apaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thu?apaf|thu?apaf]] || [[word:ju?apaf|ju?apaf]] || [[word:shu?apaf|shu?apaf]] || [[word:ku?apaf|ku?apaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thu?apaf|thu?apaf]] || [[word:ju?apaf|ju?apaf]] || [[word:shu?apaf|shu?apaf]] || [[word:ku?apaf|ku?apaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:the?apaf|the?apaf]] || [[word:je?apaf|je?apaf]] || [[word:she?apaf|she?apaf]] || [[word:ke?apaf|ke?apaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotho?apaf|thotho?apaf]] || [[word:jojo?apaf|jojo?apaf]] || [[word:shosho?apaf|shosho?apaf]] || [[word:koko?apaf|koko?apaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tho?apaf|tho?apaf]] || [[word:jo?apaf|jo?apaf]] || [[word:sho?apaf|sho?apaf]] || [[word:ko?apaf|ko?apaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tho?apaf|tho?apaf]] || [[word:jo?apaf|jo?apaf]] || [[word:sho?apaf|sho?apaf]] || [[word:ko?apaf|ko?apaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæ?apaf|thæ?apaf]] || [[word:jæ?apaf|jæ?apaf]] || [[word:shæ?apaf|shæ?apaf]] || [[word:kæ?apaf|kæ?apaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatha?apaf|thatha?apaf]] || [[word:jaja?apaf|jaja?apaf]] || [[word:shasha?apaf|shasha?apaf]] || [[word:kaka?apaf|kaka?apaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tha?apaf|tha?apaf]] || [[word:ja?apaf|ja?apaf]] || [[word:sha?apaf|sha?apaf]] || [[word:ka?apaf|ka?apaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tha?apaf|tha?apaf]] || [[word:ja?apaf|ja?apaf]] || [[word:sha?apaf|sha?apaf]] || [[word:ka?apaf|ka?apaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sha?apaf|sha?apaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosha?apaf|gosha?apaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisha?apaf|gokisha?apaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sha?apafnü|sha?apafnü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosha?apafnknü|gosha?apafnknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?apafnü|gokisha?apafnü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sha?apafshë|sha?apafshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkshë|gosha?apafnkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisha?apafshë|gokisha?apafshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?apafro|sha?apafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkro|gosha?apafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?apafro|gokisha?apafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?apafmu|sha?apafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkmu|gosha?apafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?apafmu|gokisha?apafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sha?apafsher|sha?apafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosha?apafnksher|gosha?apafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisha?apafsher|gokisha?apafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sha?apafng|sha?apafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkng|gosha?apafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisha?apafng|gokisha?apafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sha?apafya|sha?apafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkya|gosha?apafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisha?apafya|gokisha?apafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sha?apafyam|sha?apafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkyam|gosha?apafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisha?apafyam|gokisha?apafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?apafnüshë|sha?apafnüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?apafnknüshë|gosha?apafnknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?apafnüshë|gokisha?apafnüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?apafnüro|sha?apafnüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?apafnknüro|gosha?apafnknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?apafnüro|gokisha?apafnüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?apafnümu|sha?apafnümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?apafnknümu|gosha?apafnknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?apafnümu|gokisha?apafnümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?apafshënü|sha?apafshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkshënü|gosha?apafnkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?apafshënü|gokisha?apafshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?apafshëro|sha?apafshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkshëro|gosha?apafnkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?apafshëro|gokisha?apafshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?apafshëmu|sha?apafshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkshëmu|gosha?apafnkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?apafshëmu|gokisha?apafshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?apafronü|sha?apafronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkronü|gosha?apafnkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?apafronü|gokisha?apafronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?apafroshë|sha?apafroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkroshë|gosha?apafnkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?apafroshë|gokisha?apafroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?apafromu|sha?apafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkromu|gosha?apafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?apafromu|gokisha?apafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?apafmunü|sha?apafmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkmunü|gosha?apafnkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?apafmunü|gokisha?apafmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?apafmushë|sha?apafmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkmushë|gosha?apafnkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?apafmushë|gokisha?apafmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?apafmuro|sha?apafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?apafnkmuro|gosha?apafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?apafmuro|gokisha?apafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
